Maelstroms are [[psychohazards]] that result in [[Spiralling]].

Not all spiralling occurs based on Maelstroms, but Maelstroms are judged as particularly prone to causing it. 

Maelstroms include [[nationalism]], [[drugs]], and [[romance]]. Non-maelstroms that can cause [[spiralling]] include many religious practices and [[family]] which are are all important but can be spiralled around just as anything else
[[Category:Spiralling]]
[[sn:Maelstrom]][[Category:Psychohazards]]
[[sn:Maelstrom]][[Category:Maelstroms]]
They cause reciprocal narrowing in particular. [[Cope]] is more linked to parasitic processing
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
